concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 使用线性回归预测NASA 2011-2020年的ISS预算，基于2011-2016年数据拟合直线，R²=0.992，并外推至2020年。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Using a linear regression equation, we were able to project the annual budget for the years between 2017 and 2021.

concepts_used.title: 残差分析与模型诊断
concepts_used.how_used: 绘制残差图检验线性回归模型的适用性，残差随机分布表明线性模型合适。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: A residuals graph below shows approximately random scatter among the residuals, indicating that a linear model is appropriate for this model.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 使用R²（决定系数）评估线性回归拟合优度，R²=0.992表明99.2%的变异可由年份解释。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: NASA's projected ISS budget follows a very clear linear model (Figure 1) with an r2 value of 0.992, which indicates a very strong correlation in which 99.2% of the variability of the budget is accounted for by the year.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 对所有参数进行集体灵敏度分析，检验成本对参数变化的稳健性，确保总成本不超过预算。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We performed sensitivity analyses on all our parameters collectively to further ensure that our cost will not surpass our projected budget, and determined that our model was resistant to variability.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出10条模型假设，每条假设后附有合理性论证，例如预算线性趋势、无重大故障、宇航员任期6个月等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption: NASA's International Space Station budget will follow the projected linear trend. Justification: NASA has projected budgets from 2011 to 2016 which follow a linear pattern with an R2 value of .992

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：Introduction（问题背景）、General Assumptions（假设）、Parameters（参数）、Variables and Equations（变量与方程）、Objectives（目标）、Task 1-6（建模与求解）、Discussion（讨论）、References（参考文献）、Appendix（附录）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Contents: 1. Introduction, 2. General Assumptions and Justifications, 3. Parameters, 4. Variables and Equations, 5. Objectives, Task 1: Establishing Budget, ... 6. Discussion, 7. References, 8. Appendix

concepts_used.title: 图表标题与编号规范
concepts_used.how_used: 图表有编号和标题，如Figure 1. Linear Regression for ISS Projected Budgets，Figure 2. Residuals Plot for ISS Projected Budgets。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 1. Linear Regression for ISS Projected Budgets

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用散点图加拟合直线展示线性回归结果，使用残差图检验模型假设，图表类型选择恰当。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 1. Linear Regression for ISS Projected Budgets
